entities.description: Diverse germplasm of Cicer arietinum L. used in genetic analysis

entities.description: A mating design used to estimate genetic variances for agronomic characters

entities.description: A genetic analysis method used for comparison with line x tester results

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD

entities.description: An agronomic character predominantly controlled by additive genetic variance

entities.description: An agronomic character predominantly controlled by additive genetic variance

entities.description: An agronomic character predominantly controlled by additive genetic variance

entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: SECONDARY BRANCHES
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: GENETIC VARIANCE
entities.description: The nature of variance for grain yield and related characters

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC VARIANCE
entities.description: A component of genetic variance that controls specific traits and interacts with environment

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENETIC VARIANCE
entities.description: A component of genetic variance that influences specific traits and interacts with environment

entities.name: F(1) GENERATION
entities.description: A generation used for estimating genetic variances

entities.name: F(2) GENERATION
entities.description: A generation used for estimating genetic variances

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors including sites and seasons that interact with genetic components of variance

entities.name: SITE
entities.description: A location where experiments were conducted, interacting with genetic variance

entities.name: SEASON
entities.description: A time period where experiments were conducted, interacting with genetic variance
